data.title: Melaka Tengah, Melaka
data.description:
Room Bilik Sewa Pengkalan Rama Jaya99 Melaka Tengah
🏠 Serviced Rooms for Rent near Jaya99 Business Complex & Melaka River Cruise – center of Melaka Old Town
Location: Pengkalan Rama (beside Jaya99 & River Cruise Melaka)
Are you looking for a hassle-free room rental experience in Melaka? Look no further!
🛋️ Fully furnished house with a cozy living environment!
🧹 Weekly cleaning service provided for public areas!
🛏️ Available Rooms:
Big Room with Queen Size Bed & Air Conditioner
Monthly Rent: RM350
✔ Included Utilities (Electric, Water & Internet)
AC usage by meter*
Single Room with Single Bed
Monthly Rent: RM250
✔ Included Utilities (Electric, Water & Internet)
🎒 Fully Furnished Room – Just Bring Your Bag!
Included Amenities:
✔ Bed frame
✔ Mattress & Pillow
✔ Bed sheet & Pillow case
✔ Working/Study Table & Chair
✔ Window Curtains
✔ Ceiling Fan
✔ Air Conditioner
✔ Lighting & convenient socket outlets
Shared Areas:
🚿 Bathroom (Water heater provided)
🍽 Dining area (Dining table & chairs)
🍳 Kitchen (Electric stove + basin + fridge + water boiler – light cooking allowed)
🧺 Laundry (Washing machine; clothes drying area provided)
What’s Included:
✔ Electricity
✔ Water
✔ Internet
✔ Weekly House Cleaning Service
📍 Location Advantages:
✨ Located in the heart of Melaka Old Town
✨ Walking distance to Jaya99 Shopping Complex – easy access to shopping & daily needs
✨ Walking distance to Melaka River Cruise – iconic tourist attraction
✨ Surrounded by cafes, local food stalls, restaurants & convenience stores
✨ Prime tourist hotspot with vibrant surroundings
✨ Easy access to public transport & main roads
✨ Minutes to Jonker Street and major attractions
✨ Ideal for working adults, students & those who enjoy city lifestyle
📞 Contact for Viewing:
Max – Preferably via WhatsApp
📱
📝 To Help Us Know You Better, Please Provide:
Name:
Gender:
College/Workplace:
Job:
Room Type:
Budget:
Date Move-In:
Period of Staying:
ℹ️ Additional Information:
✔ Deposit refundable upon check-out
✔ Minimum 6 months tenancy (shorter stay subject to additional charges)
Make your stay in Melaka comfortable, convenient, and centrally located. Don’t miss out on this opportunity—contact Max today for a viewing! 🌟

data.title: Rembia, Melaka
data.description:
🏠 Serviced Rooms for Rent at Rembia, Alor Gajah, Melaka! 📍
We welcome working adults and students!
🛋️ Fully furnished house with a cozy living environment!
🧹 Weekly cleaning service provided for public areas!
🛌 Single room available, RM200 monthly
🛌 Single room with aircond: available, RM250 monthly
🛌 Big room with Queen Size Bed +AC: available, RM350 monthly
💰 Utilities (electricity, water) and internet, RM50 only
📞 Interested? Contact us via WhatsApp:
Max: 018-28 000 82
🛋️ Fully Furnished Room! Just bring your bag and stay!
Bed frame with mattress
Bed sheet & Pillow case
Working/Study Table & Chair
Ceiling Fan / Wall Fan & Exhaust fan (Good air ventilation)
Lighting & convenient socket outlets
🚿 Shared Areas:
Bathroom (Water heater provided)
Dining area (Dining table & chairs)
Kitchen (Basin, Fridge, water boiler)
Laundry (Washing Machine & clothes horse)
🌟 What's Included:
House Cleaning Service
24-hour CCTV security system
Fire protection equipment
📍 Location and Nearby Amenities:
3-5 minutes WALKING distance to 7-11, convenient stores, halal restaurants, 24-hour laundry shop, RM2 shop...
5 minutes drive to Rembia, Alor Gajah Industrial area, Paya Rumput Industiral area, HONDA factory...
📝 Kindly provide your info for better understanding:
Name:
Gender:
College/Workplace:
Job:
Room type:
Budget:
Move-in date:
Staying period:
ℹ️ Additional Information:
1-month deposit for Non-AC room, 2 months for AC-equipped room
Deposit is refundable upon check-out
Minimum 6 months tenancy contract, additional charges for less than 6 months
🔎 Other Services:
Rooms available in various locations across Melaka.
Renovation & room sublet services at contractor prices.
🌟 We're also looking for cleaners & agents. Contact us if interested!
📞 For inquiries or viewing arrangements, please contact us via WhatsApp.
Thank you!

data.title: Melaka Raya, Melaka
data.description:
🏡 Cozy Co-Living Rooms for Rent – Jalan Melaka Raya 23, Melaka Raya! 🏡
Walking distance to Element Mall, Mahkota Parade & Dataran Pahlawan!
Looking for a comfy, fully furnished space to call home in the heart of Melaka? Whether you’re a student or working professional, our co-living rooms offer the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and community—right in Melaka Raya! 🌟
✨ Room Types & Rates:
💥 L Size Single Room (Single Bed): RM200/month
💥 L Size Single Room (Single Bed + AC): RM250/month
*Seperate Units for Male & Females only available!
🌈 All-Inclusive Amenities:
💡 Utilities: Basic electricity & water + high-speed Wi-Fi :RM50 only
❄️ Metered Air-Cond – Pay only for what you use (sub-meter in each room)
🧹 Weekly cleaning of shared/common areas
🛏️ Fully furnished: Bed, mattress, fresh linens, study desk, chair, fan, and plenty of power sockets
🛁 Shared areas: Bathroom with hot shower, dining space, kitchen (fridge + water dispenser), laundry area (washing machine + clothesline)
🔒 Safe & secure: 24/7 CCTV & fire safety equipment
🌍 Prime Location – Walk to Everything!
📍 Located at Jalan Melaka Raya 23, Melaka Raya
📍 Walking distance to Element Mall, Mahkota Parade, and Dataran Pahlawan
📍 Surrounded by cafes, restaurants, convenience stores (7-Eleven, FamilyMart), and more!
📌 Booking is Easy – Just Send Us:
🔹 Your Name, Gender, College/Workplace, Occupation
🔹 Preferred Room, Budget, Move-in Date, and Duration of Stay
💰 Affordable & Flexible Terms:
🔸 Deposit: 1-month for non-AC, 2-months for AC rooms (fully refundable)
🔸 Minimum stay: 6 months (shorter stays available with extra charge)
🔨 Move-in Available from December!
This unit is currently under renovation—book early to secure your spot for December!
✨ Other Rooms Across Melaka + Extra Services Available!
We also offer rooms near MITC, MMU, Jaya99, Klebang, Tengkera, Lotus Malim, and Ong Kim Wee.
Need help with renovation or customization? We offer contractor-rate services: plumbing, wiring, painting, partitions, and more!
📩 DM us now for more info or to book your room today!

data.title: Jalan Tengkera,Melaka City, Melaka
data.description:
*Rumah Flat 3bilik & 2bilik air
*Kemasukkan segera
*Rumah sudah siap dibersihkan & dicat baru
*akses yg sgt dekat utk ke bandar Melaka & Pantai Klebang

*Berhampiran kedai makan,surau,masjid, speedmart,petronas & sekolah
*5 minit ke klebang
*5 minit ke bandar Melaka
*2/3 minit ke Klinik Kesihatan Tengkera
*view Kota Laksamana

data.title: Durian Tunggal, Melaka
data.description:
WTL (FOR RENT/UNTUK DISEWA)
Kemasukan segera ‼️
🔥 Rumah Cantik Taman Bukit Tambun Perdana 1, Durian Tunggal, Melaka 🔥
Details
---------------
▪️Double Storey Terrace
▪️3 Bilik Tidur, 2 Bilik Air, 1 Stor
▪️1,150 Sqft
▪️Balkoni di Master Bedroom
▪️Rumah atas bukit (selamat dari banjir)
▪️Open facing (tidak menghadap rumah)
▪️Kawasan yang tenang
▪️Partially Furnished
▪️Berhadapan Taman Permainan
▪️Tempat paking kereta mudah
Partially Furnished
▪️Rumah lengkap dengan air & elektrik
▪️Grill lengkap dipasang
▪️Kabinet Dapur (Dapur Extend)
▪️Kabinet Tv
▪️Water Heather ( Bilik Air Atas)
▪️Bilik Utama (Almari Pakaian, Balkoni)
▪️Bilik Kedua
▪️Bilik ketiga
Kemudahan
-----------------------
▪️5 minit to pekan durian tunggal (Masjid, Sekolah, Bank, Klinik, Pam minyak, Balai Polis dan lain2)
▪️5 minit ke plaza tol
▪️5 minit ke UTEM
▪️12 minit ke Zoo Ayer keroh, Taman botanikal, Taman Buaya, Taman Burung dan lain2
▪️15 minit ke ayer keroh MITC, Mydin, KWSP, LHDN, TNB, TM, dan lain2
▪️15 minit ke Alor Gajah
▪️20 minit ke Bandar Melaka
===========================
Number Contact: 0 11-2087 7617
===========================

data.title: Ayer Keroh, Melaka
data.description:
BILIK NON-SHARING SELESA & PRIVACY (Muslim & Muslimah) – 7 Minit ke UTeM Melaka!
Mencari bilik yang tenang untuk belajar dan rehat tanpa perlu pening kepala kongsi bilik? Just bring your clothes! Sesuai sangat untuk student UTeM & working adults yang utamakan keselesaan, kebersihan, dan akses pantas ke kampus.
✨ GoRoom Rental by Kak Azlyn
📌 Taman Impiana Kesang, Jasin/Durian Tunggal, Melaka
(Lokasi sangat strategik: Hanya 7 minit sahaja dari Pintu Belakang UTeM!)
🌐 Klik Sini Untuk Peta Lokasi (https://maps.app.goo.gl/w3fN21jCXZsEzz4c8?g_st=ac)
💰 MONTHLY SEWA BULANAN: RM330
Perincian Bayaran (Sebelum Masuk):
1. Deposit 2 Bulan (Refundable): RM660
2. Sewa Bulan Pertama: RM330
3. Agreement & Management Fee (Non-refundable): RM100
Total Bayaran Sebelum Kemasukan: RM1,090
🏢 Butiran Hartanah
* Jenis Hartanah: Landed (Kawasan perumahan yang tenang & selamat)
* Jenis Unit: Bilik Sederhana (Non-Sharing, Single)
* Keluasan Rumah: 800 kaki persegi (anggaran)
* Keluasan Bilik: 70 kaki persegi (anggaran)
* Status: Fully Furnished
* Keutamaan Penyewa: Lelaki & Perempuan/ Muslim Sahaja
🛏️ Kemudahan Lengkap Dalam Bilik
* Rangka Katil + Tilam 10 Inci & Bantal (Serta Cadar & Sarung Bantal)
* Meja Belajar, Kerusi & Lampu Meja
* Almari Pakaian
* Kipas Siling
* Langsir, Lampu & Soket Kuasa
🍳 Kemudahan Kongsi (Shared Facilities)
* Dapur Lengkap: Kabinet Dapur, Dapur Memasak (Light cooking dibenarkan) & Sinki
* Peralatan Elektrik: Peti Sejuk, Penapis Air & Mesin Basuh
* Ruang Makan & Santai: Meja Makan, Bilik Air Kongsi, Meja Seterika (Ironing board)
💥 Kelebihan Ekstra (Extra Perks You'll Love!)
* 🚀 FREE High-Speed WiFi (Mudah nak buat assignment atau work from home)
* 🚿 FREE Air (Tiada kos tersembunyi)
* 🧼 FREE Servis Pembersihan Bulanan (Rumah sentiasa bersih & kemas macam hotel!)
* ⚡ Subsidi Elektrik: RM100 disediakan (Lebihan daripada itu akan dibahagikan sama rata antara penyewa)
🌟 Apa Yang Menarik di Lokasi Ini? (Taman Impiana Kesang)
* 🎓 Sangat Dekat Dengan UTeM: Hanya 7 minit ke pintu belakang UTeM. Tak perlu hadap jem lama-lama, jimat minyak dan masa!
* 🍃 Persekitaran Tenang & Kondusif: Kawasan perumahan yang damai, jauh dari bising jalan utama—sangat sesuai untuk student fokus belajar & pekerja berehat.
* 🚗 Akses Mudah: Laluan mudah ke Durian Tunggal, Jasin, dan Ayer Keroh (Tol Ayer Keroh).
* 🏪 Kemudahan Berdekatan: Berhampiran dengan kedai runcit, kedai makan/kedai mamak, stesen minyak, dan kemudahan asas lain untuk keperluan harian anda.
📲 STOK BILIK ADALAH TERHAD!
Jika berminat, sila hubungi kami segera sebelum bilik penuh:
💬 WhatsApp Kak Azlyn:
👉 Klik Sini Untuk WhatsApp (https://www.wasap.my/6
/)
(No. Tel: +60 11-5377 6564)
📞 Hubungi (Call):
⚠️ Disclaimer:
1. Sila baca iklan ini dengan teliti.
2. Rumah dijangka siap dan sedia untuk diduduki pada bulan JULAI 2026.
3. Buat masa ini, bilik tidak sesuai untuk dilawati kerana sedang dalam proses RENOVATION / SETUP.
4. Gambar yang digunakan adalah untuk tujuan ilustrasi sahaja tertakluk kepada kekosongan.

* Ruang Makan & Santai: Meja Makan, Bilik Air Kongsi, Meja Seterika (Ironing board)
💥 Kelebihan Ekstra (Extra Perks You'll Love!)
* 🚀 FREE High-Speed WiFi (Mudah nak buat assignment atau work from home)
* 🚿 FREE Air (Tiada kos tersembunyi)
* 🧼 FREE Servis Pembersihan Bulanan (Rumah sentiasa bersih & kemas macam hotel!)

data.title: Bukit Baru, Melaka
data.description:
Serviced Rooms for Rent at Pusat Perniagaan Bukit Baru, Melaka!
Are you looking for a comfortable and convenient place to stay in Pusat Perniagaan Bukit Baru, Melaka? Look no further! We offer fully furnished serviced rooms in a cozy living environment. Our rooms are ideal for working professionals and students alike.
Location: Our rooms are conveniently located in Pusat Perniagaan Bukit Baru, Melaka. The area offers easy access to nearby amenities and attractions.
Nearby Amenities:
Shopping Centers/Malls:
Big10 (walking distance)
AEON Mall Melaka Tengah (approximately 2.5 kilometers away)
Tesco Melaka Peringgit (approximately 3 kilometers away)
Melaka Mall (approximately 3.5 kilometers away)
Mahkota Parade (approximately 6 kilometers away)
Restaurants and Cafes:
Nasi Ayam Famosa Bukit Baru (within walking distance)
Restoran Hajah Mona Asam Pedas (within walking distance)
Restoran Selera Kampung (within walking distance)
McDonald's Bukit Baru (approximately 1 kilometer away)
Old Town White Coffee (approximately 1 kilometer away)
Banks: (approximately 1 kilometer away)
Maybank Bukit Baru
Public Bank Bukit Baru
CIMB Bank Bukit Baru
RHB Bank Bukit Baru
Education Institutions:
Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (approximately 3 kilometers away)
Kolej Yayasan Saad Melaka (approximately 3 kilometers away)
Kolej Universiti Islam Melaka (approximately 3 kilometers away)
SMK Bukit Baru (approximately 1 kilometer away)
Hospitals and Clinics:
Hospital Melaka (approximately 1 kilometer away)
Pantai Hospital Ayer Keroh (approximately 4 kilometers away)
Mahkota Medical Centre (approximately 6 kilometers away)
Klinik Kesihatan Bukit Baru (within walking distance)
Room Types and Pricing:
Large Single room with Queen Size bed & Private bathroom : RM400 / pax / month (with AC)
Single room with Single Size bed: RM250 / pax / month (without AC)
Utilities and Amenities:
Rental includes basic electricity, water, and free internet.
AC electricity is calculated using individual room sub-meters, so you only pay for your own consumption.
Weekly cleaning service provided for public areas.
Fully furnished rooms with all necessary furniture.
Shared bathroom with water heater.
Dining area with a table and chairs.
Kitchen equipped with a basin, fridge, and water boiler.
Laundry facilities with a washing machine and clothes horse.
Good air ventilation with ceiling fans, wall fans, and exhaust fans.
CCTV 24-hour security system and fire protection equipment.
Booking and Contact Information:
If you are interested in viewing the rooms, kindly contact us via WhatsApp:
Fiza: 011-27799 358
Max: 018-28 000 82
Additional Information:
To help us assist you better, please provide the following details when contacting us:
Name:
Gender:
College/Workplace:
Job:
Room type:
Budget:
Date Move In:
Period of staying:
Terms and Conditions:
1-month deposit required for non-AC rooms, refundable after checkout.
2-months deposit required for AC-equipped rooms, refundable after checkout.
Minimum 6 months tenancy contract. Stays below 6 months are subject to additional charges.
Other Services:
Apart from the rooms available in Pusat Perniagaan Bukit Baru, we also have rooms in various locations across Melaka:
Ayer Keroh (near MITC)
Bukit Beruang (near MMU)
Krubong (near Taman Perindustrian Krubong, Taman Perindustrian Cheng, and Taman Perindustrian Malim)
Pangkalan Rama (near Jaya99)
Merlimau (near Politeknik)
Kota Laksamana (near Tengkera)
Limbongan (near Hospital Klebang)
Cheng (near Lotus & Malim)
Rembia (near the industrial area)
Bandaraya (near Ong Kim Wee)
Additionally, we offer renovation and room sublet services at contractor prices. If you have any inquiries, please feel free to contact us.
Note: We are also looking for cleaners and agents. If you're interested, please get in touch with us.
Thank you for considering our serviced rooms for rent

data.title: Ayer Keroh, Melaka
data.description:

Looking for a clean, safe & comfortable place near the Melaka city center?
Our Co-Living Rooms at Plaza Semabok are the perfect choice!

Just bring your bag and move in!
🌟 Why Stay With Us?
✨ Each room has its own private bathroom
✨ Fully furnished house — ready to stay
✨ Public area cleaning included
✨ FAST Broadband Internet
✨ Flat rate utilities (water & common electricity included!)
✨ Air-cond electric on sub-meter — pay only what you use!

Laundry area (washing machine, clothes rack)
📍 Strategic Location — WALKING DISTANCE to Amenities
3–5 min walk to convenience stores, halal restaurants, 24hr laundry
Walk to OnCar, BMW, Nissan, Honda, Toyota showroom
7–8 min drive to Mahkota Medical Centre, Ujong Pasir, Mahkota Parade, Melaka Raya
Perfect for working adults, interns, students, and short-term workers!
